description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2024 BMW X5 M60i xDrive, 4.4 TC V8, 4WD, 530bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 349,000 or AED 5,467 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 17,074 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until November 2027 or 200,000kms - BMW Service Contract Valid Until November 2034 or 100,000kms - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Recuperation System - Remote Engine Start - M Sport Exhaust System - 22" Alloy Wheels - M Sport Differential - Adaptive M Suspension - Comfort Access System - Soft Close Automatic System For Doors - M Sport Package Pro - M Sport Brake, Blue High-Gloss - BMW Individual Shadowline Lights - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - Active Seat Ventilation, Front - Comfort Seats, Electric. Adjustable - Glass Application Crafted Clarity - M Seat Belts - Interior Trim Finishers Carbon Fibre - Automatic Air Conditioning 4-Zone Control - Ambient Lighting - Driving Assistant Professional - Parking Assistant Professional - Apple CarPlay - Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Surround Sound - Wireless Charging Tray - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Aerodynamics Package - Roof-lining Alcantara - BMW Individual High-gloss Shadowline Exterior Trim With Extended Features
